children.text: With this option enabled, the application will alert you if you exceed the chosen speed limit
Select the speed limit for towns and urban areas
For highways and roads outside built-up areas
For freeways and other high speed roadways
Choose an alert sound from the available ringtones
Select the indicator to be displayed to the left above the speed graph
Select the indicator to be displayed in the center above the speed graph
Different layouts offer different customization options
Choose the primary color of the speedo layout. Default is gray
Smaller looking layout that have additional tick marks but does not have the outer arc
Select data to display in the top left corner of the speedometer
Enables to set the top limit of the speed bar
Allows you to put your phone on the dashboard and see the text reflected in the front glass
Display additional info in the HUD mode
Display additional info in the zoom mode
Text color for the current speed on all dashboards
Text color that will be used for the additional info
When enabled, pressing the Back or Home buttons will minimize the app and keep it running in the background
Record the track data in the background for later export
Export the current track to the SD card on every exit
Smallest time interval between two recordings of your position
Smallest distance between two recordings of your position
Data coming from the GPS receiver will be ignored if your position is not at least this accurate
Used to remove erroneous spikes in the speed data caused by GPS positional errors. Uncheck this when driving a Bugatti Veyron
This feature requires internet connection through Wi-Fi or cellular network
Use the GPS-generated heading when moving faster than normal walking speed (approx. 3 mph). If disabled, the app will always rely on the sensor heading (less accurate)
This option prevents the accelerometer from randomly changing the screen orientation while the phone is in a car dock
